violations.description: Input field 'name' has no associated <label> element. Placeholder text is not a substitute for labels.
violations.reference_fix:
<label for="name">Your Name</label>
<input type="text" id="name" placeholder="Your Name">

violations.description: Input field 'email' has no associated <label> element. Placeholder text is not a substitute for labels.
violations.reference_fix:
<label for="email">Email Address</label>
<input type="email" id="email" placeholder="Email Address">

violations.description: Input field 'subject' has no associated <label> element. Placeholder text is not a substitute for labels.
Textarea 'message' has no associated <label> element. Placeholder text is not a substitute for labels.

page_description: A restaurant contact form with four input fields (name, email, subject, message). None of the inputs have associated <label> elements — only placeholder text is used.
